# teams app manifest download

Download manifest from a Teams app

## Usage

```
teams app manifest download [appId] [file-path]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |
| `file-path` | Output file path (displays to stdout if not provided) | No |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
